name: evaluate_project
description: Produce a structured viability assessment of the founder's business concept. Call after evaluating the selected direction to give the founder an honest go/no-go recommendation. Requires the refined concept and the founder's constraints.

skills.description: The founder's skills for assessing founder-market fit

segments.description: Target customer segments for assessing market viability

business_models.description: Candidate business models for assessing revenue feasibility

viability_score.description: Overall viability score from 0 (do not pursue) to 1 (strong opportunity)

strengths.description: Key strengths of this business concept

founder_fit.description: Assessment of how well this founder is positioned to execute this concept

market_opportunity.description: Assessment of the market size and timing

key_assumptions.description: Critical assumptions that must be validated before committing

suggested_validation_steps.description: Concrete steps to validate the concept before investing significant resources

summary.description: A frank 2-3 sentence assessment of the overall opportunity
